LanguageData.LoGiQ_SRCW_Intro: Are you here to help us?
LanguageData.LoGiQ_SRCW_Opt_3: Maybe I can help you with current task? (-intellect-)
LanguageData.LoGiQ_SRCW_Opt_4: It was near the wreck. What is it? (-item-)
LanguageData.LoGiQ_SRCW_Rep_1: Ok. Sorry, but i need go work.
LanguageData.LoGiQ_SRCW_Opt_11: Of course! We are all counting on you! A person with such a bright mind quickly solve the problem. (-social-)
LanguageData.LoGiQ_SRCW_Rep_2: Hey! Try it yourself if you think you can do it better!
LanguageData.LoGiQ_SRCW_Rep_3: M... yes, you looks intellegent, in front of others *shows notes*
LanguageData.LoGiQ_SRCW_Opt_31: Yes, I can help with that. (finish)
LanguageData.LoGiQ_SRCW_Rep_4: Interesting! I will take it for research.
LanguageData.LoGiQ_SRCW_Rep_11: Khm... Thanks... But I really need to go work. *smiles*
LanguageData.LoGiQ_SRCW_Rep_5: We need some qualified engineers at workbench, good hacker at terminal, and attentive scientist at research table. If you know somebody, who can help with researching, try use commconsole to discuss problems with them.
